identity.mission: Create a 'Flow State' task orchestrator that feels like a Zen garden for productivity. Rejection of standard SaaS templates.
core_principles: Fusion: Swiss Typography x Organic Softness
Content: The Task is the Hero
Negative Space: Aggressive use of whitespace

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto
grid_system.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 border-r border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl z-50

InputArea.style: bg-surface shadow-xl shadow-indigo-500/10 border border-border rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden
InputArea.enhancement: Add a subtle 'breathing' glow animation behind the input when AI is processing.

TaskCard.style: group relative bg-surface hover:bg-surface_highlight border border-border hover:border-indigo-200 dark:hover:border-indigo-800 rounded-xl p-5 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg

elements.badge: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
elements.title: font-medium text-text_primary group-hover:text-indigo-600 dark:group-hover:text-indigo-400 transition-colors

Sidebar.item_style: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-accent transition-colors

StatsWidget.style: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-6 flex flex-col items-start justify-between h-32 hover:border-indigo-500/30 transition-colors

images.description: Minimalist workspace with book and armchair, conveying calm focus.
Abstract black and white design for empty task lists.

general: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings and 'Inter' for body.
Ensure Light/Dark mode toggling works seamlessly.
Input Area must feel 'intelligent' - use animations to suggest AI processing.
accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG AA standards.
All interactive elements must have focus states.
testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Fonts: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css'.
3. Theme: Implement a 'ThemeProvider' context for light/dark mode persistence.
4. Layout: Create a responsive Sidebar (drawer on mobile, fixed on desktop).
5. Logic: Mock the Gemini API with a realistic delay and randomized categorization if actual API key is missing, or provide a clear place to input it.
6. Polish: Apply the 'Soft Utility' color palette defined above.
